subject: Mathematics
overall_learning_objectives: Use Tally Marks to organize information
Appreciate the importance of data in daily life

lesson_plan.title: Data Collection and Tally Marks
teaching_strategy: Board demonstration of the diagonal 5th mark
student_activities: Record the favorite sport of 10 classmates using tallies
Convert a list of random numbers into a frequency table
assessment: Quick worksheet on building a frequency table

lesson_plan.title: Pictographs
topics_covered: Understanding the 'Key' or 'Scale' of a pictograph
Interpreting partial symbols (e.g., half a picture)
teaching_strategy: Comparison of tally tables vs. pictographs
student_activities: Create a pictograph for 'Number of books read' where 1 book icon = 2 books
Answer questions based on a provided fruit-stall pictograph

teacher_tip: Always remind students that the 'Key' is the most important part of a pictograph—without it, the pictures are just drawings, not data!
